g.text: - Zero bearer tokens — all auth via x509 or Managed Identity
- Azure Firewall: deny-all default, explicit allowlist
- Private endpoints: Key Vault + MongoDB never on public internet
- NSG per subnet: only required ports/protocols
- MongoDB IP allowlist: VNet PE + Skip's IP only
- All inter-service: mTLS (certs from Key Vault)
- FedRAMP High, HIPAA BAA, FIPS 140-2 L2, HITRUST
- TRICARE-ready: CUI-level protection for military beneficiaries
